hgc_intro.explanation: Introduce GC by witnessing the exact heap predicate (= h) which is affine because h is heap_affine.

hgc_inv.solution:
Lemma hgc_inv : forall h,
  \GC h ->
  heap_affine h.
Proof using.
  introv M. unfold hgc in M. destruct M as (H&h1&h2&(E1&HA)&M2&D&U).
  subst. rewrite Fmap.union_empty_l in U. subst.
  applys HA M2.
Qed.
hgc_inv.explanation: Eliminate GC by extracting the affine witness H and applying haffine to the heap.

himpl_hgc_absorb_r.solution:
Lemma himpl_hgc_absorb_r : forall H,
  haffine H ->
  \GC \* H ==> \GC.
Proof using.
  introv M. xchange <- hstar_hgc_hgc. xsimpl. applys himpl_hgc_r M.
Qed.
himpl_hgc_absorb_r.explanation: GC * H ==> GC when H is affine: convert H to GC, then merge two GCs into one using hstar_hgc_hgc.

triple_hgc_post.solution:
Lemma triple_hgc_post : forall t H Q,
  triple t H (Q \*+ \GC) ->
  triple t H Q.
Proof using.
  introv M. intros h Hh.
  lets (h'&v&R&HQ): M Hh.
  exists h' v. splits. { auto. }
  { xchange HQ. xchange hstar_hgc_hgc. xsimpl. }
Qed.
triple_hgc_post.explanation: Discard GC from postcondition: the triple definition already includes GC, so the extra GC merges via hstar_hgc_hgc.

triple_haffine_post.solution:
Lemma triple_haffine_post : forall t H H' Q,
  haffine H' ->
  triple t H (Q \*+ H') ->
  triple t H Q.
Proof using.
  introv HA M. applys triple_hgc_post.
  applys triple_conseq M. { xsimpl. }
  { intros v. xchange (himpl_hgc_r HA). xsimpl. }
Qed.
triple_haffine_post.explanation: Discard affine H' from postcondition by first converting H' to GC, then applying triple_hgc_post.

triple_hgc_post_from_triple_haffine_post.solution:
Lemma triple_hgc_post_from_triple_haffine_post : forall t H Q,
  triple t H (Q \*+ \GC) ->
  triple t H Q.
Proof using.
  introv M. applys triple_haffine_post haffine_hgc M.
Qed.
triple_hgc_post_from_triple_haffine_post.explanation: Derive triple_hgc_post from triple_haffine_post by noting that GC itself is affine.

triple_haffine_pre.solution:
Lemma triple_haffine_pre : forall t H H' Q,
  haffine H' ->
  triple t H Q ->
  triple t (H \* H') Q.
Proof using.
  introv HA M. applys triple_haffine_post HA.
  applys triple_frame M.
Qed.
triple_haffine_pre.explanation: Discard affine H' from precondition: frame H' into the triple, then discard it from the postcondition.

triple_conseq_frame_hgc.solution:
Lemma triple_conseq_frame_hgc : forall H2 H1 Q1 t H Q,
  triple t H1 Q1 ->
  H ==> H1 \* H2 ->
  Q1 \*+ H2 ===> Q \*+ \GC ->
  triple t H Q.
Proof using.
  introv M WH WQ. applys triple_hgc_post.
  applys triple_conseq_frame M WH WQ.
Qed.
triple_conseq_frame_hgc.explanation: Combined consequence-frame-discard rule: use triple_conseq_frame, then discard the GC from the postcondition.

triple_ramified_frame_hgc.solution:
Lemma triple_ramified_frame_hgc : forall H1 Q1 t H Q,
  triple t H1 Q1 ->
  H ==> H1 \* (Q1 \--* (Q \*+ \GC)) ->
  triple t H Q.
Proof using.
  introv M WH. applys triple_hgc_post.
  applys triple_ramified_frame M WH.
Qed.
triple_ramified_frame_hgc.explanation: Ramified frame with GC: apply the ramified frame rule, then discard the GC from postcondition.

wp_hgc_post.solution:
Lemma wp_hgc_post : forall t Q,
  wp t (Q \*+ \GC) ==> wp t Q.
Proof using.
  intros. rewrite wp_equiv. applys triple_hgc_post. rewrite <- wp_equiv. xsimpl.
Qed.
wp_hgc_post.explanation: WP-style discard rule: convert to triple, apply triple_hgc_post, convert back.

wp_haffine_pre.solution:
Lemma wp_haffine_pre : forall t H Q,
  haffine H ->
  (wp t Q) \* H ==> wp t Q.
Proof using.
  introv HA. xchange wp_frame. applys wp_conseq.
  intros v. xchange (himpl_hgc_r HA). xchange wp_hgc_post.
Qed.
wp_haffine_pre.explanation: Discard affine H from wp precondition: frame H in, then discard it from the postcondition.

wp_haffine_pre_alternative.solution:
Lemma wp_haffine_pre' : forall t H Q,
  haffine H ->
  (wp t Q) \* H ==> wp t Q.
Proof using.
  introv HA. rewrite wp_equiv. applys triple_haffine_pre HA.
  rewrite <- wp_equiv. xsimpl.
Qed.

mkstruct_haffine_post.solution:
Lemma mkstruct_haffine_post : forall H' F Q,
  haffine H' ->
  mkstruct F (Q \*+ H') ==> mkstruct F Q.
Proof using.
  introv HA. unfold mkstruct. xpull. intros Q'. xsimpl Q'.
  intros v. xchange (himpl_hgc_r HA). xchange hstar_hgc_hgc.
Qed.
mkstruct_haffine_post.explanation: Discard affine predicates from mkstruct postconditions.

mkstruct_haffine_pre.solution:
Lemma mkstruct_haffine_pre : forall H' F Q,
  haffine H' ->
  (mkstruct F Q) \* H' ==> mkstruct F Q.
Proof using.
  introv HA. unfold mkstruct. xpull. intros Q'. xsimpl Q'.
  intros v. xchange (himpl_hgc_r HA).
Qed.
mkstruct_haffine_pre.explanation: Discard affine predicates from mkstruct preconditions.
